prompt: Background scene for a children's game: the INSIDE of a cozy candy bakery shop, cute storybook cartoon style with soft pastel candy colors (same style as a cartoon candy street game, NOT a photograph, NOT photorealistic). Wide view of the shop interior: a wooden counter with cakes and cupcakes under glass domes, shelves with jars of colorful candies and cookies, a striped awning detail over the shelves, a big warm window with soft light, hanging bunting flags, wooden floor. Soft flat cartoon illustration, gentle warm lighting, slightly blurred/soft so game UI can sit on top. STRICTLY FORBIDDEN: any letters, words, numbers or writing anywhere; no people, no characters. Landscape composition filling the whole frame.
